'''鈭歸-f-g''' ('''kawafag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:queme|queme]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-f-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:queme|queme]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歸-f-g
|-
! Lemma
| kawafag
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwafag|thiwafag]] || [[word:jiwafag|jiwafag]] || [[word:shiwafag|shiwafag]] || [[word:kiwafag|kiwafag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwafag|thuthuwafag]] || [[word:jujuwafag|jujuwafag]] || [[word:shushuwafag|shushuwafag]] || [[word:kukuwafag|kukuwafag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwafag|thuwafag]] || [[word:juwafag|juwafag]] || [[word:shuwafag|shuwafag]] || [[word:kuwafag|kuwafag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwafag|thuwafag]] || [[word:juwafag|juwafag]] || [[word:shuwafag|shuwafag]] || [[word:kuwafag|kuwafag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewafag|thewafag]] || [[word:jewafag|jewafag]] || [[word:shewafag|shewafag]] || [[word:kewafag|kewafag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowafag|thothowafag]] || [[word:jojowafag|jojowafag]] || [[word:shoshowafag|shoshowafag]] || [[word:kokowafag|kokowafag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowafag|thowafag]] || [[word:jowafag|jowafag]] || [[word:showafag|showafag]] || [[word:kowafag|kowafag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowafag|thowafag]] || [[word:jowafag|jowafag]] || [[word:showafag|showafag]] || [[word:kowafag|kowafag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙wafag|th忙wafag]] || [[word:j忙wafag|j忙wafag]] || [[word:sh忙wafag|sh忙wafag]] || [[word:k忙wafag|k忙wafag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawafag|thathawafag]] || [[word:jajawafag|jajawafag]] || [[word:shashawafag|shashawafag]] || [[word:kakawafag|kakawafag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawafag|thawafag]] || [[word:jawafag|jawafag]] || [[word:shawafag|shawafag]] || [[word:kawafag|kawafag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawafag|thawafag]] || [[word:jawafag|jawafag]] || [[word:shawafag|shawafag]] || [[word:kawafag|kawafag]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawafag|shawafag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawafag|goshawafag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawafag|gokishawafag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawafagn眉|shawafagn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawafagnkn眉|goshawafagnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawafagn眉|gokishawafagn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawafagsh毛|shawafagsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawafagnksh毛|goshawafagnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawafagsh毛|gokishawafagsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawafagro|shawafagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawafagnkro|goshawafagnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawafagro|gokishawafagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawafagmu|shawafagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawafagnkmu|goshawafagnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawafagmu|gokishawafagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawafagsher|shawafagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawafagnksher|goshawafagnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawafagsher|gokishawafagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawafagng|shawafagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawafagnkng|goshawafagnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawafagng|gokishawafagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawafagya|shawafagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawafagnkya|goshawafagnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawafagya|gokishawafagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawafagyam|shawafagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawafagnkyam|goshawafagnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawafagyam|gokishawafagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawafagn眉sh毛|shawafagn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawafagnkn眉sh毛|goshawafagnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawafagn眉sh毛|gokishawafagn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawafagn眉ro|shawafagn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawafagnkn眉ro|goshawafagnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawafagn眉ro|gokishawafagn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawafagn眉mu|shawafagn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawafagnkn眉mu|goshawafagnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawafagn眉mu|gokishawafagn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawafagsh毛n眉|shawafagsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawafagnksh毛n眉|goshawafagnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawafagsh毛n眉|gokishawafagsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawafagsh毛ro|shawafagsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawafagnksh毛ro|goshawafagnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawafagsh毛ro|gokishawafagsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawafagsh毛mu|shawafagsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawafagnksh毛mu|goshawafagnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawafagsh毛mu|gokishawafagsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawafagron眉|shawafagron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawafagnkron眉|goshawafagnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawafagron眉|gokishawafagron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawafagrosh毛|shawafagrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawafagnkrosh毛|goshawafagnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawafagrosh毛|gokishawafagrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawafagromu|shawafagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawafagnkromu|goshawafagnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawafagromu|gokishawafagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawafagmun眉|shawafagmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawafagnkmun眉|goshawafagnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawafagmun眉|gokishawafagmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawafagmush毛|shawafagmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawafagnkmush毛|goshawafagnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawafagmush毛|gokishawafagmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawafagmuro|shawafagmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawafagnkmuro|goshawafagnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawafagmuro|gokishawafagmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
